requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling (Cameroon NC / IEC 60335-2-24 + Kigali)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理（喀麦隆NC / IEC 60335-2-24 + 基加利）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理（喀麥隆NC / IEC 60335-2-24 + 基加利）

summary.en: Cameroon does not operate an EU-style F-Gas phase-down regulation. Refrigerant safety for household refrigerating appliances is addressed through the appliance safety standard adopted by ANOR (NC based on IEC 60335-2-24), whose Annex AA sets requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants such as R-600a (isobutane, classified A3 lower flammability, GWP about 3) — maximum charge per compartment configuration, ventilation, and ignition-source controls. On the environmental side, Cameroon is a Party to the Montreal Protocol and its Kigali Amendment, phasing down HFCs through its National Ozone Unit under the Ministry of Environment, Nature Protection and Sustainable Development; import of controlled HFC refrigerants (e.g., R-134a) may be subject to quota/licensing under the ODS/HFC import-control system, but household appliances charged with R-600a (a hydrocarbon, not an HFC) fall outside HFC controls. Documentation should declare the refrigerant type and charge quantity.
summary.zh: 喀麦隆未实施欧盟式氟气体削减法规。家用制冷器具的制冷剂安全通过ANOR采用的器具安全标准（基于IEC 60335-2-24的NC）处理，其附件AA规定了使用R-600a（异丁烷，归类A3较低可燃性，GWP约3）等可燃制冷剂器具的要求——每种隔间配置的最大充注量、通风及点火源控制。环境方面，喀麦隆是《蒙特利尔议定书》及其《基加利修正案》缔约方，通过环境、自然保护与可持续发展部下属国家臭氧机构削减HFC；受控HFC制冷剂（如R-134a）的进口可能受ODS/HFC进口管制系统的配额/许可约束，但充注R-600a（碳氢化合物，非HFC）的家用器具不在HFC管制范围内。文件应声明制冷剂类型及充注量。
summary.zht: 喀麥隆未實施歐盟式氟氣體削減法規。家用製冷器具的製冷劑安全通過ANOR採用的器具安全標準（基於IEC 60335-2-24的NC）處理，其附件AA規定了使用R-600a（異丁烷，歸類A3較低可燃性，GWP約3）等可燃製冷劑器具的要求——每種隔間配置的最大充注量、通風及點火源控制。環境方面，喀麥隆是《蒙特利爾議定書》及其《基加利修正案》締約方，通過環境、自然保護與可持續發展部下屬國家臭氧機構削減HFC；受控HFC製冷劑（如R-134a）的進口可能受ODS/HFC進口管制系統的配額/許可約束，但充注R-600a（碳氫化合物，非HFC）的家用器具不在HFC管制範圍內。文件應聲明製冷劑類型及充注量。

standards_or_laws: NC / IEC 60335-2-24 — Annex AA: Requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants (R-600a charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source requirements) as adopted by ANOR
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)
Montreal Protocol + Kigali Amendment — Cameroon HFC phase-down via the National Ozone Unit (Ministry of Environment, Nature Protection and Sustainable Development)

summary.en: China addresses flammable-refrigerant safety for household appliances through GB 4706.13 (Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances), which incorporates R-600a flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24, and broader refrigerating-system safety via GB 9237 (aligned with ISO 5149). On the environmental side, China implements its HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment (ratified June 2021), administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE). Because both China's GB 4706.13 and Cameroon's NC trace to IEC 60335-2-24, refrigerant safety requirements for R-600a appliances are closely aligned; a Chinese R-600a appliance is generally well-positioned, subject to charge and documentation verification.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB 4706.13（制冷器具的特殊要求）处理家用器具的可燃制冷剂安全，其中包含源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性规定，并通过GB 9237（参照ISO 5149）处理更广泛的制冷系统安全。环境方面，中国依据《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）执行HFC削减，由生态环境部（MEE）管理。由于中国GB 4706.13与喀麦隆NC均溯源至IEC 60335-2-24，R-600a器具的制冷剂安全要求高度一致；中国R-600a器具一般具备良好条件，但须核实充注量及文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB 4706.13（製冷器具的特殊要求）處理家用器具的可燃製冷劑安全，其中包含源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性規定，並通過GB 9237（參照ISO 5149）處理更廣泛的製冷系統安全。環境方面，中國依據《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）執行HFC削減，由生態環境部（MEE）管理。由於中國GB 4706.13與喀麥隆NC均溯源至IEC 60335-2-24，R-600a器具的製冷劑安全要求高度一致；中國R-600a器具一般具備良好條件，但須核實充注量及文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13 — flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) provisions for household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: For R-600a appliances the gap is small and mainly documentary: (1) appliance documentation submitted in the PECAE conformity dossier should explicitly state the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane) and charge weight in grams, with the IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA safety provisions evidenced; (2) the R-600a charge must be within the IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA limits — a Chinese GB 4706.13 / CCC report (IEC 60335-2-24 basis) generally covers this but should be confirmed for the exported configuration; (3) Cameroon has no EU-style F-Gas prohibition list for HFC products, so an HFC model (e.g., R-134a) is not banned, but the HFC refrigerant itself may be subject to Kigali-related import quota/licensing through the National Ozone Unit — verify before shipping HFC-charged units. There is no EU-style horizontal F-Gas charge-documentation or technician-certification regime imposed on the product at import.
gap.zh: 对于R-600a器具，差距较小且主要属文件性：（1）提交至PECAE合格评定档案的器具文件应明确说明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）及充注量（克），并提供IEC 60335-2-24附件AA安全规定的证据；（2）R-600a充注量须在IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值内——中国GB 4706.13/CCC报告（IEC 60335-2-24基准）一般已涵盖，但应针对出口配置确认；（3）喀麦隆无欧盟式针对HFC产品的氟气体禁令清单，故HFC型号（如R-134a）未被禁止，但HFC制冷剂本身可能通过国家臭氧机构受基加利相关进口配额/许可约束——装运HFC充注产品前请核实。进口环节未对产品施加欧盟式横向氟气体充注量文件或技术人员资质制度。
gap.zht: 對於R-600a器具，差距較小且主要屬文件性：（1）提交至PECAE合格評定檔案的器具文件應明確說明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）及充注量（克），並提供IEC 60335-2-24附件AA安全規定的證據；（2）R-600a充注量須在IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值內——中國GB 4706.13/CCC報告（IEC 60335-2-24基準）一般已涵蓋，但應針對出口配置確認；（3）喀麥隆無歐盟式針對HFC產品的氟氣體禁令清單，故HFC型號（如R-134a）未被禁止，但HFC製冷劑本身可能通過國家臭氧機構受基加利相關進口配額/許可約束——裝運HFC充注產品前請核實。進口環節未對產品施加歐盟式橫向氟氣體充注量文件或技術人員資質制度。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level via NC / IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA (R-600a charge limits, ventilation); HFC refrigerants may be subject to Kigali-related import quota/licensing via the National Ozone Unit. No EU-style F-Gas product-prohibition regime
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali administered by MEE — separate import-control system

source.publisher: ANOR (Agence des Normes et de la Qualite, Cameroun) / Cameroon National Ozone Unit (Ministere de l Environnement)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is well-positioned for Cameroon: there is no EU-style F-Gas phase-down regulation, and refrigerant safety rests on NC / IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA, which Chinese GB 4706.13 closely mirrors. Manufacturers should declare the refrigerant type and charge weight in the PECAE conformity dossier and confirm the charge stays within Annex AA limits for the exported configuration. HFC-charged models are not banned but the HFC itself may face Kigali import quota/licensing via the National Ozone Unit.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a在喀麦隆具备良好条件：无欧盟式氟气体削减法规，制冷剂安全依据NC/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA，中国GB 4706.13与之高度一致。制造商应在PECAE合格评定档案中声明制冷剂类型及充注量，并确认出口配置的充注量在附件AA限值内。HFC充注型号未被禁止，但HFC本身可能通过国家臭氧机构面临基加利进口配额/许可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a在喀麥隆具備良好條件：無歐盟式氟氣體削減法規，製冷劑安全依據NC/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA，中國GB 4706.13與之高度一致。製造商應在PECAE合格評定檔案中聲明製冷劑類型及充注量，並確認出口配置的充注量在附件AA限值內。HFC充注型號未被禁止，但HFC本身可能通過國家臭氧機構面臨基加利進口配額/許可。
